gpu.description: Number of GPUs allocated to the Studio session.

cpu.description: Number of CPUs allocated to the Studio session.

memory.description: Amount of memory in MiB allocated to the Studio session.

mountData.description: Deprecated array of data-link IDs mounted in the Studio session. This field only supports data-link IDs without path prefixes. Can be `null` to preserve existing mounts.

environment.description: Array of environment variable key-value pairs set in the Studio session.

condaEnvironment.description: Conda package specification for custom packages installed in the Studio environment.

lifespanHours.description: Number of hours the Studio session will run before automatically stopping. A value of `0` indicates unlimited lifespan.

configuration.description: Updated Studio resource allocation and environment configuration. Can be `null`.

description.description: Optional Studio description. Maximum length is 2048 characters. Can be `null`.

labelIds.description: Array of label numeric identifiers to apply to the Studio. Can be `null`.

name.description: Optional Studio session name. Must be between 1 and 80 characters when provided. Can be `null`.

body.description: Fields to update on the studio.
